---
name: Bug report
about: Something renders wrong, crashes, or exits with the wrong code
labels: bug
---

## What happened

<!-- What you did, what you expected, what you got. -->

## Snapshot shape

- Platform: <!-- CJA or AA -->
- Producer and version: <!-- e.g. cja_auto_sdr 3.5.x — the report footer and
  `meta.adapter_version` in the embedded payload carry it -->
- Rough size: <!-- component count, or the report header's counts -->
- Can you share a minimal snapshot that reproduces it? <!-- strip real
  names/ids first; even a two-component repro helps enormously -->

## Environment

- sdr-visualizer version: <!-- `sdr-visualizer --version` -->
- Browser + OS (for rendering issues):

## Output

<!-- Exit code, stderr, or a screenshot of the broken view. -->
